footer.tagline: Management software for boutique travel agencies

home.meta_title: Traviosoft - The management software for boutique travel agencies
home.meta_description: Traviosoft centralizes quotes, orders, payments, suppliers and invoicing for boutique travel agencies and DMCs. Book a 30-minute demo.

hero.headline: The management software built for boutique travel agencies
hero.subheadline: Quotes, orders, payments and suppliers, all in one place, no more scattered spreadsheets and Word documents.

pain_points.title: Does this sound familiar?
pain_points.item1_text: Every quote is rebuilt from scratch in Excel or Word, margins are recalculated by hand, and the final result doesn't always look as professional as you'd like when sending it to a client.
pain_points.item2_text: Who paid the deposit? Who still owes the balance before departure? Without a dedicated tool, this lives in a spreadsheet, or in your head, with the risk of forgetting a reminder.
pain_points.item3_title: Supplier coordination scattered across emails and messages
pain_points.item3_text: Guides, hotels, transport providers: every important piece of information (contact details, documents, languages spoken, rates) is scattered across chat threads and attachments.

solution.title: One platform, from first contact to invoice
solution.flow: Client request → Quote → Order → Supplier coordination → Tracked payments → Invoicing
solution.description: Everything is connected: an accepted quote automatically generates an order with its tasks, and every payment milestone is linked to the right quote and client.
solution.cta: Discover how it works step by step

pillars.title: What Traviosoft changes in practice
pillars.p1_text: Put a quote together in minutes, with the total and your margin worked out for you. The moment a client accepts, the order and everything to arrange appear on their own.
pillars.p2_title: Make the client relationship more professional
pillars.p2_text: Polished quotes and service documents that look the part, clear tracking of every request (new, awaiting reply, handled), and a full history for each client.
pillars.p3_title: Stay on top of payments and invoicing
pillars.p3_text: Set payment milestones directly on the quote, attach a payment link to each one, and track client and supplier invoices with clear statuses (draft, issued, partially paid, paid).
pillars.p4_title: Centralize suppliers, guides and your catalog
pillars.p4_text: Supplier and guide profiles with contacts, documents and languages spoken. A service catalog with categories and seasonal pricing. Everything connected to your quotes and orders.

steps_preview.title: From the client's first message to the final invoice, in 6 steps
steps_preview.step1: A request comes in and is centralized
steps_preview.step2: A quote is created and sent to the client
steps_preview.step3: The accepted quote becomes an order, with its tasks
steps_preview.step4: The team executes: service sheets, suppliers coordinated
steps_preview.step5: Payments are tracked with milestones and reminders
steps_preview.step6: Invoicing happens, for both clients and suppliers
steps_preview.cta: See the detail of each step

trust.title: Built from real-world use, not from an abstract spec sheet
trust.text: Traviosoft was built with, and for, a boutique travel agency based in Spain, specializing in tailor-made trips. The product keeps evolving in contact with agencies like yours, with a simple goal: replace scattered spreadsheets and Word documents with a tool designed for the job.
trust.cta: Book a demo and talk it through

multilang.title: Built for international teams and clients
multilang.text: The interface is available in French, English and Spanish. Your quotes, supplier profiles and documents can be managed in the language that suits each contact, without duplicating tools.

final_cta.headline: Ready to see Traviosoft working with your business?
final_cta.text: In 30 minutes, we'll look together at how Traviosoft fits your way of working, no strings attached.

product.meta_description: See what changes when quotes, orders, payments, suppliers and invoicing live in one tool built for boutique travel agencies. Book a 30-minute demo.

intro.headline: Less time fighting admin. More time selling trips.
intro.text: You didn't start a travel agency to wrestle with spreadsheets. Here's what your days look like once every quote, payment and supplier lives in one place.

requests.title: Never lose a lead again
requests.benefit: Every enquiry in one list, so no client ever slips through the cracks.
points: Every enquiry lands in the same place, with a status you read at a glance: new, waiting, handled
Open a client and their whole history is right there: enquiries, quotes, orders, invoices
Their details and tax information are ready to drop straight into a quote, no retyping
requests.change: You stop wondering "did I ever reply to that couple?": the answer is on the screen.

quotes.title: Send quotes you're proud of, in minutes
quotes.benefit: A polished quote that looks like it took you hours, ready in a few clicks.
points: Pick services from your catalog and the quote builds itself as you go
Your total and your margin update on their own, so you never undersell by mistake
Send a clean, on-brand quote while the client is still excited
See at a glance which quotes are sent, accepted, or about to expire
quotes.change: The quote that used to eat your whole evening now goes out before the client cools off.

orders.title: The trip prepares itself once it's sold
orders.benefit: An accepted quote turns into a ready-to-go checklist, on its own.
points: The moment a client says yes, the order and its to-do list appear automatically
Nothing to remember to book: every task is already waiting for you
Print a clean service sheet for the day of the trip
Always know where a file stands: awaiting payment, in progress, done
orders.change: No more "what did we still have to arrange for them?": the list already exists.

suppliers.title: Every guide and supplier, one search away
suppliers.benefit: Contacts, contracts and languages spoken, all in one place and up to date.
points: Find a guide's number or a hotel contract in seconds, instead of digging through old emails
Keep every document attached to the right supplier
See who speaks which language and covers which area before you book
See your whole history with each supplier, from past trips to the documents they sent
suppliers.change: When you need that guide right now, you actually find them.

catalog.title: Build quotes from prices you trust
catalog.benefit: Your services and rates ready to drop in, always current.
points: Reuse your services instead of retyping prices every single time
Set different rates by season, so you never quote last year's price by accident
Keep your cost and your selling price side by side, so your margin is never a guess
catalog.change: Quoting becomes picking from a list, not rebuilding everything from memory.

projects.title: Keep the big, complex trips under control
projects.benefit: Several alternative versions of a trip, neatly organized in one place.
points: Offer a client two or three versions of a trip without losing track
Keep the number of travelers and the trip's details tied to the project
Follow a complex file from first idea to departure in one place
projects.change: Group trips and "can you show me option B?" stop being a headache.

payments.title: Always know who still owes you
payments.benefit: One clear view of who has paid, who hasn't, and what you owe your suppliers.
points: See at a glance who paid the deposit and who still owes the balance before departure
Split a trip into payment milestones with due dates, and attach a payment link to each one
Track client and supplier invoices with clear statuses, in the same place
payments.change: The "have they paid?" spreadsheet disappears, and so does the forgotten reminder.

reports.title: See how the business is really doing
reports.benefit: A clear overview of your activity, without building a single spreadsheet.
points: One overview of quotes, orders and payments, always up to date
Numbers you can trust, because they come straight from your real files
reports.change: You step back and see the whole business at a glance, whenever you want.

multilang.title: Work in your language, sell in theirs
multilang.benefit: One tool for an international team and international clients.
points: Use the interface in French, English or Spanish
Handle each client's tax details the way their country expects

journey.title: From the client's first message to the final invoice
journey.text: Each step builds on the one before it, so there is no double data entry and nothing to copy from one tool to another.

everything.title: Everything your agency runs, in one place
everything.text: Beyond the day-to-day flow, Traviosoft keeps the rest of your operation together too.

final_cta.headline: Picture your whole agency running from one calm screen

how_it_works.meta_description: From the client request to the invoice, discover the full journey of a file through Traviosoft, step by step.

intro.headline: From the client's first message to the final invoice
intro.text: Here's how a client file moves through Traviosoft, from the first request to invoicing. Each step builds on the information entered in the previous one: no double data entry, no files to copy elsewhere.

steps.title: One request, one place
steps.description: Add a new request yourself in seconds, or connect Traviosoft to your website so enquiries land in it on their own. Each one carries a clear status (new, awaiting reply, handled), so nothing slips between the inbox and a sticky note.
steps.before: Requests get lost between the inbox, paper notes and people's memory.
steps.after: Every request is visible in one place, with its status.
steps.name: Requests

steps.title: A quote built in minutes
steps.description: From the request, you put the quote together in minutes. The total and your margin are worked out for you, and you send it to the client with an expiry date in a couple of clicks.
steps.before: Every quote is rebuilt from scratch in Excel or Word, with the risk of calculation errors.
steps.after: The quote reuses your usual prices, works out the margin for you, and is ready to send in minutes.
steps.name: Quotes

steps.title: The client says yes, the work sets itself up
steps.description: As soon as the client accepts, the trip moves into preparation on its own: an order is created with a ready-made list of everything to arrange (bookings, documents to prepare, and so on). And when the client pays, the payment is recorded in the app automatically, so you always know where you stand.
steps.before: You have to re-read the accepted quote and manually recreate a task list in another tool.
steps.after: The order and its to-do list exist as soon as the quote is accepted, and payments show up on their own.
steps.name: Order setup

steps.title: Supplier coordination and service sheets
steps.description: The team follows the order's to-do list, prepares the service documents for the day of the trip, and coordinates suppliers and guides from their profiles (contacts, documents, languages spoken).
steps.before: Coordination happens through scattered emails and messages.
steps.after: Every task, supplier and document is linked to the corresponding order.
steps.name: Coordination

steps.title: Payments tracked, nothing forgotten
steps.description: Split the trip into payments (a deposit, then the balance, for example) and Traviosoft keeps an eye on each one: what's due, what's been paid, and what still needs a reminder, all in the same place.
steps.before: Payment tracking lives in a separate spreadsheet, with the risk of forgetting a reminder.
steps.after: Every milestone is linked to the quote and order, with its payment status.
steps.name: Payments

steps.title: Client and supplier invoices, with clear statuses
steps.description: Client invoices are generated with detailed line items and follow a precise status (draft, issued, partially paid, paid). Supplier invoices are tracked with the same level of detail, to keep a complete view of your real margins.
steps.before: Client and supplier invoices are tracked in separate documents, disconnected from the original quote.
steps.after: Everything stays linked to the client file, from the initial quote to the final invoice.
steps.name: Invoicing

final_cta.headline: See this workflow applied to your own business
final_cta.text: In 30 minutes, we'll walk through this process together with an example close to your real activity.

pricing.meta_description: A simple pricing model, no hidden fees, built for boutique travel agencies. Book a demo to get your quote.

intro.headline: One product, shaped around your agency. Priced for your team size.
intro.text: Traviosoft adapts to the way your agency works, not the other way around. The only thing that sets your price is how many people on your team use it.

model.title: A Traviosoft that fits your agency, sized to your team
points: Tailored to the way your agency works, so it feels made for you
A price set by your team size (small team, growing team, full team), so you only pay for the seats you use
No hidden setup or onboarding fees
Monthly or annual billing, your choice
model.text: A one-person agency and a fifteen-person team don't need different software, just a price that fits their size. So we kept one product, and let your team size set the price.

trial.title: Try it before you commit
trial.text: A trial period is available so you can explore Traviosoft with your own files, with no upfront commitment.

why_no_price.title: You get your price on the demo call
why_no_price.text: We set it with you during the demo, based on your team size and how you work. You leave the call knowing exactly what Traviosoft costs for your agency.

final_cta.headline: Get your price in 30 minutes
final_cta.text: Book a demo: we'll look at your agency together, match the price to your team size, and give you a clear figure.
final_cta.cta: Book a demo to get your price

about.meta_description: Traviosoft was born from the real-world needs of a boutique travel agency. Discover the philosophy behind the product.

intro.headline: Made for the boutique agencies big software forgets
intro.text: Traviosoft started with a real problem: a travel agency juggling Excel, Word and endless chat messages just to keep its trips moving. We built the tool that agency actually needed, and kept going from there.

story.title: Built with a real agency
story.text: Traviosoft was developed with, and for, a boutique travel agency based in Spain that specializes in tailor-made trips. Every part of it comes from a real day-to-day need we watched the team run into.

philosophy.title: Built for small teams
philosophy.text: Most travel management software is built for large organizations, with heavy processes and modules a small agency will never open. Traviosoft is the simple version: focused on what a 2-to-15-person team running tailor-made trips actually does every day.

support.title: Real people who know the job
support.text: When you contact us, you talk to someone who knows both the product and the travel agency business. The first demo is a working session: we look together at how Traviosoft fits your way of working, and we are honest when it doesn't.

final_cta.headline: Let's talk about your business
final_cta.text: The best way to know if Traviosoft is right for your agency is to talk it through directly.

demo.meta_description: Book a 30-minute demo to discover how Traviosoft fits your travel agency. No commitment, no sales script.

hero.headline: Book your 30-minute demo
hero.subheadline: We'll look together at how Traviosoft fits your business. No sales script, no commitment.

what_to_expect.title: What to expect
points: A walkthrough of Traviosoft tailored to your business (team size, type of trips, current tools)
A concrete demo of the quote → order → payment → invoice flow
Your questions, with no artificial time pressure
If it's a fit: a clear price tailored to your situation
what_to_expect.text: If Traviosoft isn't a fit for your business, we'll tell you directly, no detours.

fit_yes.title: Traviosoft is a particularly good fit if...
points: You run a tailor-made travel agency, a DMC or a specialized inbound operator
Your team has between 2 and 15 people
You currently manage quotes, payments or suppliers with Excel, Word or software that wasn't built for travel agencies
You want to make your quotes and client documents more professional without overhauling your whole setup

fit_no.title: It's probably not (yet) for you if...
points: You handle several hundred quotes a month with a large dedicated sales team
You're looking for an online booking platform for the general public (OTA)

reassurance.title: No commitment
points: No obligation to buy after the call
Questions about data security, importing your existing data, or setup time are welcome during the call (and in the FAQ)

final_cta.headline: Pick a time that works for you

faq.meta_description: Answers to frequently asked questions about Traviosoft: data security, setup time, data import, available languages and more.

intro.headline: Frequently asked questions
intro.text: If your question isn't here, ask it directly during the demo.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes. Your data sits on secure servers, and only the people you authorize at your agency can see it. It stays yours, and you can export it whenever you want.

items.question: How long does it take to get started?
items.answer: It depends on what you bring over: how many clients, open quotes and suppliers you have. On the demo we look at your real data together and give you a realistic idea of the time involved.

items.question: Is it suitable if I work alone? What about a team of 10 or 15?
items.answer: Both work. Traviosoft is built for teams of 2 to 15, and it works just as well for one person running everything from the first quote to the final invoice.

items.question: Can we import our existing clients, quotes or suppliers?
items.answer: Usually yes. If your data is in Excel or exported from another tool, we can bring it in. We settle the best way to do it on the demo, based on what you already have.

items.question: Is the software available in my language?
items.answer: The interface is available in French, English and Spanish, and each person on your team can pick their own.

items.question: What happens if I want to cancel?
items.answer: Your data stays yours. If you decide to leave, we arrange an export so you take it with you. The exact terms are set out in your service agreement, and we are happy to walk you through them.

items.question: Does Traviosoft replace my website or my accounting software?
items.answer: No. Traviosoft is the internal tool for running your quotes, orders, payments and suppliers. It doesn't replace your public website or your accounting software, though tracking your client and supplier invoices in it does make your accountant's job easier.

privacy.intro: This policy explains how we handle information collected through the traviosoft.com website. It covers the public website only. The use of the Traviosoft application by our customers is governed by a separate agreement.

sections.heading: Who we are
body: This website is published by Sidoine Dantin EI, registered in France under SIRET 941 883 779 00014, the business behind Traviosoft, management software for boutique travel agencies. For any question about this policy or your data, you can contact us at sidoine@traviosoft.com.

sections.heading: What we collect
body: When you book a demo, you share the details you enter in the booking form: usually your name, your email address, and a few facts about your agency. The booking itself is handled by Google's appointment scheduling, so the information you submit there is also processed by Google.
Like most websites, our hosting provider records basic technical data such as your IP address and browser type in its server logs. We do not use advertising trackers or build marketing profiles.

sections.heading: How we use your information
body: We use the details you give us to answer your demo request, prepare the call, and follow up about Traviosoft. We use technical logs to keep the site secure and working. We never sell your data, and we do not share it except with the service providers needed to run the site and the booking.

Where the law requires a legal basis, we rely on your request (to organize the demo you asked for) and on our legitimate interest in keeping the site safe and in contact with people who reached out to us.

sections.heading: Third-party services
body: The demo calendar is provided by Google. Booking a slot is subject to Google's own terms and privacy policy. The website is delivered through Cloudflare's hosting and content network. These providers process limited data on our behalf to make the booking and the site work.

sections.heading: Cookies
body: The website uses only the cookies needed for it to function and to remember your language choice. The embedded booking calendar may set its own cookies, managed by Google. We do not run advertising cookies.

sections.heading: How long we keep it
body: We keep the information from your demo request for as long as we are in contact about Traviosoft, and a reasonable period afterwards. Technical logs are kept only for the short time needed for security and maintenance.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: You can ask to see the data we hold about you, to correct it, or to have it deleted. To make a request, email us at sidoine@traviosoft.com. As the business is based in France, you can also lodge a complaint with the French data protection authority (CNIL).

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
body: We may update this policy as the website evolves. The date at the top shows when it was last changed.

terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the traviosoft.com website. They apply to the public website only. Subscribing to and using the Traviosoft application is covered by a separate contract that we sign with each customer.

sections.heading: Who publishes this site
body: This website is published by Sidoine Dantin EI, registered in France under SIRET 941 883 779 00014. You can contact us at sidoine@traviosoft.com. The site is hosted by Cloudflare, Inc., 101 Townsend Street, San Francisco, CA 94107, United States.

sections.heading: Using this website
body: By browsing traviosoft.com you accept these terms. The website exists to present Traviosoft and to let you book a demo. You agree not to misuse it, for example by attempting to disrupt it, access it through automated scraping, or interfere with its security.

sections.heading: The demo booking
body: Booking a demo is free and creates no obligation to buy. A demo slot is offered subject to availability and can be rescheduled or cancelled by either side. Any price discussed during a demo is an estimate for your situation, not a binding offer until set out in a signed agreement.

sections.heading: Information on the site
body: We keep the content of this website as accurate and current as we can, but it is provided for general information. Features, descriptions and pricing may change as the product evolves. The website is provided on an "as is" basis, without warranty that it will always be available or error free.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
body: The Traviosoft name, the content, the design and the visuals on this website belong to Traviosoft. You may not copy, reuse or redistribute them without our written permission.

sections.heading: External links and services
body: The demo calendar is hosted by Google and the site is delivered through Cloudflare. We are not responsible for the content or practices of these third-party services, which are governed by their own terms.

sections.heading: Liability
body: To the extent allowed by law, we are not liable for any indirect loss arising from your use of this website. Nothing in these terms limits any right you have that cannot be waived under applicable law.

sections.heading: Governing law
body: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to the website will be subject to the competent French courts.

sections.heading: Changes to these terms
body: We may update these terms from time to time. The date at the top shows when they were last changed. By continuing to use the website you accept the version in force.

notice.intro: Legal information for the traviosoft.com website, provided under French law.

sections.heading: Site publisher
body: This website is published by Sidoine Dantin EI, a sole proprietorship (entreprise individuelle) registered in France under SIRET 941 883 779 00014. Registered address: 137 rue à Vaches, 62610 Balinghem, France. Director of publication: Sidoine Dantin. Contact: sidoine@traviosoft.com.

sections.heading: Hosting
body: The website is hosted by Cloudflare, Inc., 101 Townsend Street, San Francisco, CA 94107, United States (cloudflare.com).

sections.heading: Intellectual property
body: The Traviosoft name, the content, the design and the visuals on this website belong to Sidoine Dantin EI. Any reuse without written permission is prohibited.

sections.heading: Personal data
body: How we handle data collected through the site is described in our Privacy Policy, where you can also exercise your rights, including with the French data protection authority (CNIL).

sections.heading: Contact
body: For any question about the site, write to sidoine@traviosoft.com.
